platform_decisions.content: Ink reconciler node cache uses WeakMap keyed by DOMElement for layout metrics with auto-GC
Platform detection memoized once per process; WSL version parsed from /proc/version with fallback
AbortController hierarchy uses WeakRef to prevent parent retaining abandoned children
Tool grouping cache uses WeakMap keyed by tools array identity; evicts on array replacement
Ink event dispatcher two-phase capture/bubbling mirrors DOM semantics
EventEmitter disables maxListeners (0) for React component trees
Memory file mtime tracking via WeakMap prevents sync fs reads with cross-session persistence
Grouped tool summaries compress parallel tool calls during compaction preserving tool_use_id
Bridge API client SAFE_ID_PATTERN restricts server-provided IDs to prevent URL path injection
QueryConfig snapshotted once per query entry with immutable runtime gates
Settings deletion grace period outlasts write stability to handle delete-and-recreate pattern
Model-specific region env vars override global CLOUD_ML_REGION for Vertex multi-region
AbortController timeout via weak handlers prevents memory leak on long-lived parents
WeakSet circular reference detection in tree serialization prevents stack overflow
Synthetic output tool result cached via WeakMap keyed by input object with auto-GC
Tool grouping cache invalidates per tools array identity to catch MCP server connect refreshes
Paste content truncation with Truncated text placeholder when inline storage limit exceeded
Tool input equivalence check optional per tool for custom dedup equality logic
Yoga node measure function unset before freeing to prevent accessing freed WASM memory
React reconciliation diff pre-filters unchanged props by identity to skip deep comparison
Keyboard modifier alias normalization (Cmd/Ctrl/Alt variants) for consistent config parsing
History paste content ID auto-incrementing per prompt session for user-friendly references
